title: Read-only reentrancy in an LP share-price oracle

source.inspired_by: Curve-style read-only reentrancy that drained lending markets pricing LP tokens via a reentrancy-unsafe virtual price

ground_truth.description: withdraw() transfers ETH before decrementing shares/totalShares (a checks-effects-interactions violation). During the recipient callback the balance is already reduced while totalShares is not, so pricePerShare() -- read by integrators as an oracle -- returns a manipulated value (~50% of true). A protocol consuming it can be made to mis-price collateral and mis-liquidate.
